headline: Why The Nucor (NUE) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views And Valuations Diverge
summary: Nucor’s fair value estimate has been nudged to US$244.14 from US$240.71, a small adjustment that still matters if you are tracking where analysts think the stock sits today. That shift comes as bullish analysts publish fresh targets in the US$260 to US$270 range, while others stick to more cautious levels around US$184, creating a wider spread of opinions you will want to understand. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how you can follow it as new updates come...
